chunks.title: Medication timing best practice
chunks.content: Medication tasks should be prioritized before optional enrichment and should not be skipped when time is limited.

chunks.title: Feeding and walk spacing
chunks.content: For many dogs, avoid high-intensity walks immediately after a meal; leave buffer time before heavy activity.

chunks.title: Daily enrichment minimum
chunks.content: Cats and dogs benefit from at least one enrichment activity daily, even if short, to reduce stress behaviors.

chunks.title: Conflict management
chunks.content: If two high-priority tasks collide, keep medication first and reschedule lower-risk tasks to the next open slot.

chunks.title: Task explanation style
chunks.content: A clear schedule should include time, pet name, action, duration, and a short rationale for priority order.
